arts.ttl: Monchi moves to ‘portfolio of alternatives’ – Aston Villa won’t be wobbled by Sevilla for Loïc Badé
arts.sum: A little earlier, we covered claims from Turkey which explained Monchi has stopped Diego Carlos moving to Fenerbahce until he can find a replacement for Aston Villa. The Brazilian defender has had his flight departure delayed multiple times and it’s unsure when, or if, he’ll actually set off for Istanbul this week. arts.ttl: Teenage forward set to reject Aston Villa despite 'concrete' contract offer
arts.sum: They say Leipzig, AC Milan and Villa submitted ‘concrete’ long-term contracts to one of the most sought-after youngsters in Ligue 2. Gomis almost moved to Bayer Leverkusen in the summer of 2023, agreeing personal terms only for Caen to knock back all offers.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa could still sell Jhon Duran despite €100m price tag
arts.sum: Aston Villa could still sell Jhon Duran despite €100m price tag On Monday, West Ham launched a sensational €67 million bid for the Colombian striker that was swiftly rejected by Aston Villa, who have repeatedly insisted that Duran is not for sale this month.

arts.ttl: Àlex Moreno ‘would be delighted’ to swap Nottingham Forest for new loan – Aston Villa player has options
arts.sum: Àlex Moreno moved from Real Betis to Aston Villa in January 2023, but two years later he finds himself on loan at Nottingham Forest. Last season the 31-year-old picked up a decent number of minutes for Aston Villa, dropping out of the picture a little at the end of the campaign. arts.ttl: From Turkey: Monchi has stopped Diego Carlos exit – Reasons for Aston Villa decision explained
arts.sum: Earlier today we covered the confusion growing in Turkey related to Diego Carlos’ move from Aston Villa to Fenerbahce. The transfer was thought to be all agreed, and the Brazilian defender would be one of the additions Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho has demanded in this transfer window. arts.ttl: Augsburg set to sign Mërgim Berisha; Chrislain Matsima joins permanently
arts.sum: Kicker Magazine's Michael Pfeifer reports that FC Augsburg and TSG 1899 Hoffenheim have ironed out the details of Mërgim Berisha's loan. The Augsburger Allgemeine Zeitung also has new news to report on two other FCA player contracts.

arts.ttl: Confidence of beating Aston Villa to signing – Villans have sent concrete contract offer
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are confident that they will beat Aston Villa to the signing of Tidiam Gomis. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who says the German side are confident the 18-year-old SM Caen youngster will be joining them. Gomis is out of contract with the French side this summer. arts.ttl: Monaco vs. Aston Villa: Premier League club bidding to end historical club streak
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to end an historical club streak when they square off against Monaco in the Champions League on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa player’s arrival at new club pushed back again – Delay confusion building
arts.sum: Diego Carlos’ flight to Turkey has again been delayed as his move to Fenerbahçe from Aston Villa continues to stumble. That’s according to journalist Yağız Sabuncuoğlu, who say a new flight plan has now been arranged for the defender. The plan is for him to arrive in Istanbul at 22:00 local time. arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer allows club to clean up accounts – And then attack January transfer window too
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s move for Andrés García will allow Levante to ‘clean up’ their accounts and even attack the January transfer window. That’s according to El Dia de Cordoba, who report that the Spanish side have secured the ‘most important transfer’ in the Spanish second division.
